node.text:
From Phoenix roots to NBA champion, JDub pulls back the curtain on the moments that shaped him. 

Hit the link in bio to watch the full episode on YouTube.

Forever my second home.

Harden Vol 10 “Year of the Horse” available now on adidas.com and select stores exclusively in China.
